title: Are you near Barnstaple, North Devon?
subtitle: Come to our in-person event next week!
paragraphs: Anyone nearish to Barnstaple who fancies an in-person day of inspiration about alternative ways to learn next week?
Next Thursday I’m speaking at Barnstaple Rugby Club alongside Ian Cunningham and Sophie Lovett - there will be time to chat and imagine something different.
I personally love in-person events, they are where ideas can really take flight. Please share this if you know parents or educators who might be interested.
